title: Policy Insights: A membership for purpose-driven organisations

Facebook

Policy Insights: A membership for purpose-driven organisations

Policy Insights is Prospect’s membership platform for organisations looking to shape the policy agenda and contribute to meaningful public debate.Whether you're a think tank, academic institution, business, or advocacy group, membership offers guaranteed digital coverage across Prospect’s website, newsletters and social channels—reaching a highly engaged audience of policymakers, thought leaders and informed citizens.With Prospect’s trusted editorial reputation and progressive outlook, Policy Insights ensures your voice is not only visible, but influential.For more information about our Policy Insights series and how we can work together, please contact Wendy Miller (+44 (0) 20 3372 2936 / +44 (0) 7733 223 934) or Jonathan Cutts (+44 (0) 20 3372 2970) Policy Insights partners include:OEUKTrussellBT
